visual_contract.decision: accept the charset-independent yellow block lambda
visual_contract.invalid_assumption_replaced: screen codes 77 and 78 are diagonal graphics in the canonical mixed-case charset

capacity.attribution: A profile-faithful per-cell separator/subtitle fallback and one private separator entry replace the unavailable resident bulk primitive. Charset-independent reverse-space lambda cells remove the invalid 77/78 graphics assumption without resident Bank or overlay cost.

profile_delivery_gate.name: screen-write-string
profile_delivery_gate.rule: dialect-public and registry-bound, but absent from the canonical Workbench product define and resident manifest; screen-bulk-p fallback must be present

owner_decision: Authorize the corrected block-lambda visual contract and incremental debits of 25 B EXT, one symbol and 18 B namepool. Bank, aligned Directory, overlay and boot-overlay size remain unchanged.

promotion_conditions.wave_seal: still blocked pending regular R4/R5/R6 repin and single-device G6

claim_limit: This authorization permits promotion of the measured banner capability correction. It does not seal Wave 1 or claim R4/R5/R6/G6 evidence.
